vocab.meaning: nền tảng/phần thiết yếu của cái gì đó
vocab.example: Football is widely regarded as a cornerstone of our sporting culture, influencing everything from local fashion to weekend routines.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái hưng phấn tập thể
vocab.example: When the national team scores, the entire stadium is plunged into a state of collective euphoria that is hard to describe.

vocab.meaning: những người hâm mộ cuồng nhiệt/trung thành
vocab.example: The country is home to millions of die-hard fans who would never miss a match, regardless of the time zone.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác thuộc về một tập thể
vocab.example: Joining a local volleyball club helps many young people foster a sense of belonging within their community.

vocab.meaning: sự phổ biến không đối thủ/vô song
vocab.example: Basketball enjoys unrivaled popularity in urban areas, with makeshift courts found in almost every neighborhood.
The rise of competitive e-sports teams has become a significant cultural phenomenon among the younger generation lately.

vocab.meaning: thắt chặt/củng cố một mối quan hệ
vocab.example: Playing doubles in tennis or badminton is a fantastic way to cement a bond between colleagues outside the office.

vocab.meaning: sự cạnh tranh khốc liệt/gay gắt
vocab.example: There is stiff competition between regional teams, leading to intense derbies that dominate the news cycle.
Many parents believe that team sports instill discipline and work ethic in children from a very young age.

vocab.meaning: đạt đến cao trào/trạng thái cực kỳ phấn khích
vocab.example: Excitement reaches fever pitch during the final rounds of the championship, with streets becoming deserted as everyone tunes in.
